title: Can I afford to hire?
description: Model payroll impact before adding fixed cost.

title: Should I cut expenses?
description: Identify cost categories worth reviewing first.

title: Am I ready for funding?
description: Review directional fundability signals before applying.

title: How much runway do I have?
description: Estimate months of operating runway from cash and burn.

title: What if revenue drops?
description: Stress-test a downturn before it arrives.

title: Can I take on debt?
description: Review cash flow and debt-payment capacity directionally.

title: Should I increase ad spend?
description: Model added spend against cash cushion and expected growth.

title: What should I review every week?
description: Create a repeatable weekly finance review rhythm.
